title: abeec Set of 100 Assorted Felt Tips for Kids 3+ - 20 Different Coloured Pens in a Box – Colouring Set for Arts and Crafts Supplies
features: abeec 100 Felt Tip Pens – 100 x Assorted Colouring Pens for Kids
This colouring set includes a rainbow of eye-catching colouring pens stored in a cardboard box to store in between each use
All 100 pens are complete with click shut lids and medium sized nibs to support an array of activities from filling colouring books to drawing and doodling
Set includes: 100 felt tip pens in 20 different colours including shades of: pink, green, blue, yellow and more – enjoy 5 pens of each colour
Providing 100 felt tip pens in 1 set, it is the perfect stationery accessory to use in the classroom or at home; with over 20 different colours to choose from the colour possibilities are endless

No, these pens are recommended for children aged 3 and above due to small parts that may pose a choking hazard. Can the ink be washed out of clothing? While the pens are designed to be mess-free, it's advisable to test on a small fabric area first, as ink removal may vary depending on the material. Do the pens have individual colour names or labels? The pens do not have individual colour names or labels; however, the set includes 20 distinct colours, each represented by five pens. Is the packaging recyclable? Yes, the cardboard box packaging is recyclable, aligning with environmentally friendly practices. Are these pens refillable? No, these felt tip pens are not refillable. They are designed for single-use until the ink is depleted.
